hero.title: Explore Japan at your own pace
hero.subtitle: Rent a car in Osaka and discover Japan freely. Instant booking, flexible hours, multilingual support.

instantBooking.title: Instant booking
instantBooking.description: No waiting for approval. Pick your dates, choose your car, and you're confirmed immediately.

flexibleHours.title: Flexible hours
flexibleHours.description: Rent by the hour or the week. Our scheduling adapts to your travel plans, not the other way around.

multilingualSupport.title: Multilingual support
multilingualSupport.description: Browse in English, Japanese, or Chinese. Message our team in your language -- we'll understand.

localFleet.title: Curated fleet
localFleet.description: 40+ well-maintained vehicles based in Osaka. From compact kei cars to spacious family vans.

cta.heading: Ready to hit the road?
cta.description: Browse available vehicles and book in minutes.
